channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: politics

item.title: Judge orders Trump administration to tell fired workers they were not let go for poor performance
item.description: A U.S. district judge in California has ordered the Trump administration to provide probationary workers fired en masse a written statement saying they were not terminated for poor performance.
item.dc:creator: Janie Har, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump moves to invoke Schedule F to make it easier to fire some federal workers
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump has begun making one of the controversial personnel changes for government employees that was spelled out in the conservative Project 2025 blueprint for his second term.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS MEGERIAN and WILL WEISSERT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Judge blocks Trump administration from passport changes affecting some transgender Americans
item.description: A federal judge has partially blocked the Trump administration from enacting a policy that bans the use of “X” marker used by many nonbinary people on passports as well as the changing of gender markers.
item.dc:creator: Michael Casey, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump says Ukraine-Russia talks 'coming to a head' and 'no one is playing' him in push to end war
item.description: PARIS (AP) — President Donald Trump on Friday said negotiations between Ukraine and Russia are “coming to a head” and insisted that neither side is “playing” him in his push to end the grinding war. Trump spoke shortly after Secretary of State Marco Rubio warned that the U.S.
item.dc:creator: ANGELA CHARLTON and HANNA ARHIROVA, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: China's military pressure near Taiwan is up 300%: What it means for the US
item.description: Paparo said the U.S can no longer sit back amid “unprecedented aggression and military modernization" by the nation.
item.dc:creator: Safia Samee Ali, NewsNation

item.title: White House photo bluntly shows where parties stand on immigration amid Abrego Garcia deportation
item.description: The White House releases contrasting images showing Trump comforting grieving mother Patty Morin while Democrat senator Van Hollen meets with deported illegal immigrant in El Salvador.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Poll position: How Trump's approval rating compares to his presidential predecessors
item.description: Where President Donald Trump's approval ratings stands in a new nation poll, and where he stands in comparison to his White House predecessors during their first three months in office
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Maryland Sen. Van Hollen meets with Abrego Garcia in El Salvador amid court fight over US return
item.description: SAN SALVADOR (AP) — Maryland Sen. Chris Van Hollen met with Kilmar Abrego Garcia on Thursday evening in El Salvador, coming face to face with the wrongly deported man after two days in the country pushing for his release.
item.dc:creator: YOLANDA MAGAÑA and MARY CLARE JALONICK, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: PIX11 selected as NYC debate sponsor for first time
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) – For the first time, PIX11 has been chosen by the New York City Campaign Finance Board to be a debate sponsor this year. PIX11 has been granted the opportunity to host seven debates for the 2025 citywide elections.
item.dc:creator: PIX11 Web Team, PIX 11

item.title: Moderate Republicans draw red line on Medicaid cuts in Trump agenda bill
item.description: Vulnerable and moderate House Republicans are warning House GOP leaders that they will not support the “one big, beautiful bill” encompassing President Trump’s legislative agenda if it includes cuts to Medicaid benefits.
item.dc:creator: Emily Brooks, NewsNation

item.title: PIX on Politics Daily: NYC mayoral election poll
item.description: NEW YORK (PIX11) -- Welcome to PIX on Politics Daily with Dan Mannarino, where we break down the day's political news, headlines, and issues that matter most to you through in-depth conversation. Join us daily on PIX11+ streaming at 1 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Henry Rosoff, PIX 11

item.title: Funding for NYC Pre-K and 3-K permanently locked in: Mayor
item.description: NEW YORK CITY (PIX11) -- For the first time ever, New York City has permanently locked in funding for its Pre-K and 3-K programming, Mayor Eric Adams announced on Wednesday morning.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Jack, PIX 11

item.title: Retail sales jump as people rush to buy cars ahead of tariffs
item.description: The key driver of the economy saw the biggest increase in over two years in March, as car buyers tried to get ahead of President Donald Trump's tariffs on imported autos and auto parts.
item.dc:creator: Alina Selyukh, MPR News

item.title: NIL payments OK at UNLV, UNR, but payment amounts secret under SB293
item.description: A bill concerning NIL — name, image, likeness — and how UNLV and UNR can manage contracts directly with players passed on Tuesday in the Nevada Senate, advancing to the Assembly with other bills. A Republican leader objected to secrecy surrounding the payment amounts.
item.dc:creator: Greg Haas, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Biden says Trump administration has done 'breathtaking' damage to Social Security
item.description: Former President Joe Biden warned a Chicago audience assembled Tuesday at the national conference of Advocates, Counselors and Representatives for the Disabled that the Trump administration has "taken a hatchet" to Social Security.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, WGN 9

item.title: States push Medicaid work rules, but few programs help enrollees find jobs
item.description: Some lawmakers are pushing to require that Medicaid recipients work in order to get or keep coverage, and some states already try to help them find jobs. But the effects of those efforts are unclear.
item.dc:creator: Sam Whitehead, Phil Galewitz, and Katheryn Houghton, MPR News
